name: PythonPartTransaction
summary: Implementation of the PythonPart transaction. The transaction creates the elements in the drawing file and introduces additional steps, that would normally have to be introduced separately, after the creation. This is to make the creation easier to implement in a PythonPart script. These additional steps are:

constructors.name: PythonPartTransaction()
constructors.signature: PythonPartTransaction( doc: DocumentAdapter, connect_to_pyp: ConnectToPythonPart = ConnectToPythonPart(), connect_to_ele: ConnectToElements = ConnectToElements(), )

params.name: doc
params.doc: document of the Allplan drawing files

methods.name: execute
methods.signature: execute( placement_matrix: Matrix3D, view_world_projection: ViewWorldProjection, model_ele_list: list[Any], modification_ele_list: ModificationElementList, rearrange_reinf_pos_nr: ReinforcementRearrange = ReinforcementRearrange(), append_reinf_pos_nr: bool = True, asso_ref_object: BaseElementAdapter | None = None, uuid_parameter_name: str = "", _elementation_delete_py: bool = True, use_system_angle: bool = True, elements_to_delete: BaseElementAdapterList | None = None, ) -> BaseElementAdapterList
methods.summary: Execute the transaction. Calling the method, makes the framework perform following operations:
methods.remarks: Execute the transaction. Calling the method, makes the framework perform following operations:

params.name: modification_ele_list
params.doc: list with the UUID's of the modified PythonPart elements

params.name: append_reinf_pos_nr
params.doc: When set to True, the reinforcement position numbers are appended to the existing position numbers

params.name: uuid_parameter_name
params.doc: if set, the model object UUID of the created PythonPart is assigned to this name

params.name: _elementation_delete_py
params.doc: delete the PythonPart after the precast elementation

params.name: use_system_angle
params.doc: use the default system angle state (False = no use of the system angle) In case of True, the state of defined elements in the modification_ele_list is used - empty list = creation mode: use the system angle - element in list = modification mode: don't use the system angle

params.name: elements_to_delete
params.doc: elements which should be delete inside the created transaction
